## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://-cd7f026f.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://-cd7f026f.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About דפוס הדר
A modern and visually appealing print house business seeking a professional landing page. The brand aims to convey creativity, quality, and professionalism in the printing industry, with a contemporary and attractive aesthetic.

## Target Audience
- בעלי עסקים קטנים
- מוסדות חינוך
- בעלי עסקים גדולים
- אנשים פרטיים

## Industry
הדפסה ודפוס
